title: Gantt Export to Excel Enhancement Features Request
excerpt:
Hi there, 
We’d love to see improvements to the Gantt chart export to Excel functionality. 
Here are the current limitations we’ve encountered: 

Custom Gantt settings, such as “Label By” and “Color By,” are not retained…

posts.author: ilariatottolo2 (ilaria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We’d love to see improvements to the Gantt chart export to Excel functionality.

Here are the current limitations we’ve encountered:

  1. Custom Gantt settings, such as “Label By” and “Color By,” are not retained during the export process.
  2. The exported Excel sheet lacks a color legend, making it difficult to interpret the chart at a glance.
  3. The “Label By” field on the right of the exported chart always displays timelines, which are already listed on the left. It would be great if we could customize or remove this.
  4. On the horizontal top bar, under the month name, the starting date of each week is displayed as a number. It would be much more helpful to show the week number of the year (e.g., Week 44, Week 45).

Implementing these improvements would significantly enhance the Excel export experience for Gantt charts.

Thank you for considering our suggestions!

posts.author: MaggieB (Maggie Boler)
posts.cookedHtml:
In addition to this, I’d like to see export option that matches the time-period view you have set in the view (weeks, months, quarters). Right now when you export it defaults to a quarter view which limits detail visibility and reduces the value of exporting.

It would also be great to define dates to export within the gantt. all project/board dates or limited time range.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Critical Path is missing as well from the export.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ilariatottolo2 ,

I read your use case and thought I’d share another way to collaborate with external stakeholders on timelines outside monday.com.

With Interactive Gantt Timeline yoг can share Gantt with clients and collaborate directly on it:

  • Clients can leave comments and suggest timeline changes right on Gantt

    leave suggestions2045×1045 312 KB

  • PMs get notification about comments and suggestions, and can test different scenarios, and then approve the appropriate timeline.

    test versions gantt1581×993 212 KB

After approving, new timeline automatically updates the board.

Interactive Gantt Timeline doesn’t replace monday.com’s native Gantt — it enhances it.
Keep using monday.com’s Gantt view internally, and share Interactive Gantt Timeline with clients outside your workspace.

No version chaos.
No endless PDF exports.
Just one live Gantt for monday.com.

You can install and test the app on your account.

I’ll also tag @MaggieB . May be this information will be helpful.
